title: Communauté d'agglomération du Libournais
summary: Communauté d'agglomération du Libournais is the communauté d'agglomération, an intercommunal structure, centred on the town of Libourne. It is located in the Gironde department, in the Nouvelle-Aquitaine region, southwestern France. Created in 2017, its seat is in Libourne. Its area is 568.8 km2. Its population was 91,475 in 2019, of which 24,257 in Libourne proper.
text:
Communauté d'agglomération du Libournais is the communauté d'agglomération, an intercommunal structure, centred on the town of Libourne. It is located in the Gironde department, in the Nouvelle-Aquitaine region, southwestern France. Created in 2017, its seat is in Libourne. Its area is 568.8 km2. Its population was 91,475 in 2019, of which 24,257 in Libourne proper.

Composition
The communauté d'agglomération consists of the following 45 communes:
